title: Sankit
info: Backend & GPS Model Developer. Designed and implemented the backend infrastructure and developed GPS-related predictive models to optimize tracking and routing.

title: Handwash Recognition
info: Action Recognition Model for Hand Hygiene Assessment. Built an action recognition model for hand hygiene assessment and deployed the model for real-time inference and evaluation.

title: Multimodal HAR
info: Disentangling Confusable Actions in Multimodal HAR (EEG, EMG-IMU). Proposed a stability-driven feature selection framework to address ambiguity and integrated EEG and EMG-IMU signals.

title: ESTE-SIM Simulator
info: Interactive Endotracheal Suctioning Simulator. Developing an interactive simulation system modeling patient physiological responses in collaboration with Hokkaido University.

title: International Quant Competition
info: Quantitative Research project. Participating in international quantitative competition focused on financial modeling and strategies, developing predictive models using machine learning.
